title: 'Rahul owes explanation': BJP says IAF tender for 36 Rafales exposes Pakistan propaganda
content: The BJP has strongly criticized Rahul Gandhi, accusing him of echoing Pakistan's propaganda regarding the Rafale jets during Operation Sindoor. The party highlighted a recent IAF tender for support for all 36 Rafale jets as proof that Pakistan's claims of shooting them down were false. BJP leaders argue Gandhi questioned the Indian government instead of demanding evidence from Islamabad, thereby legitimizing an adversary's disinformation campaign.

title: Elon Musk loses trillionaire status: Here's why his net worth fell
content: Elon Musk, once the world's first trillionaire, has seen his net worth dip below the 13-figure mark to $957 billion. A significant sell-off in Tesla and SpaceX shares, following SpaceX's IPO surge, has led to this decline. Concerns over an AI market bubble and potential interest rate hikes are contributing to the downturn in tech stocks.

title: Sooryavanshi mania triggers ticket rush in Ireland ahead of possible India debut
content: Excitement is building in Ireland for 15-year-old prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's potential India debut in the upcoming T20I series. His IPL exploits have generated significant buzz, with fans from across Europe eager to witness the event. Former cricketer MV Narasimha Rao believes Sooryavanshi's style resembles Gary Sobers and advises the young talent to stay grounded amidst the growing hype.

title: Lohagad Fort murder in Pune: Ketan Agarwal's father says they initially rejected marriage proposal
content: Devastated by the loss of their son, Ketan Agarwal's parents are calling for justice as Siya Goyal, his former fiancée, and her companion Chetan Chaudhary find themselves accused of his murder at Lohagad Fort. The grieving family articulated their anguish over Ketan's death, wondering why such a tragedy had to occur following the end of the engagement while commending the authorities for their rapid response in investigating the case.

title: Wikipedia blocks founder, who praised Musk's Grokepedia, from platform: Here’s why
content: Wikipedia's co-founder, Larry Sanger, faced a temporary editing ban after advocating for greater intellectual diversity and fairness on the platform. Sanger, who coined Wikipedia's name, expressed shock at the decision, describing the editing community as a 'mob.' His initiative, WikiProject Intellectual Diversity, aimed to reinforce original commitments. Following public outcry after Sanger revealed the ban, his account was reinstated.

title: R Madhavan flaunts Rs 40 lakh limited-edition rose gold watch at Padma Shri ceremony
content: Actor R Madhavan received the prestigious Padma Shri from President Droupadi Murmu, a moment shared with his family. His exquisite 18-karat rose gold Jalsa Nebula watch, featuring a miniature painting inspired by Jaipur's Hawa Mahal and valued at Rs 40 lakhs, stole the spotlight. Madhavan expressed profound gratitude for the honour, dedicating it to his supporters and the world of cinema.

title: Matt Henry joins Jasprit Bumrah, becomes first Kiwi in 36 years to ...
content: Matt Henry has achieved a historic feat, joining Jasprit Bumrah at the pinnacle of the ICC Test bowling rankings. Both pacers now share the World No. 1 spot with 870 rating points. Henry's remarkable 11-wicket haul at The Oval propelled him to this elite status, ending a 36-year wait for a New Zealand seamer to reach the top.

title: After laying off hundreds of engineers, GM swaps 1,000 workers with 50 robots
content: General Motors has introduced 50 collaborative robots at its Michigan Factory Zero, reportedly leading to over 1,000 job eliminations. This move, aimed at cost-cutting and efficiency, sparks criticism from the United Auto Workers union, which views it as a threat to jobs. GM claims the robots support human workers, but the UAW president calls it a "fight for humanity" amid broader automation concerns in the industry.

title: ‘Constructive, forward-looking’: India, US conclude ministerial-level talks on FTA
content: India and the US concluded ministerial talks on a proposed trade deal, aiming for an interim pact before a US tariff deadline next month. Discussions focused on market access, digital trade, and reducing barriers. This follows recent high-level meetings and aims to deepen economic ties, with both nations reviewing progress on key trade elements and potential tariff adjustments.

title: INS Udaygiri, INS Kavaratti dock in Vietnam as India expands Indo-Pacific naval presence
content: Indian Navy warships INS Udaygiri and INS Kavaratti have arrived in Vietnam, marking a significant step in deepening defense ties. This deployment highlights India's growing naval presence and its commitment to maritime security in Southeast Asia. The visit underscores the strong strategic partnership between India and Vietnam, emphasizing shared concerns for a stable, rules-based maritime order in the Indo-Pacific.

title: Captain Shubman Gill overtakes Virat Kohli in latest ICC ODI rankings
content: In a remarkable turn of events, Shubman Gill now ranks second in the ICC ODI batting rankings, overtaking fellow Indian star Virat Kohli, who drops to third. Gill showcased his exceptional skills versus Afghanistan, scoring a century and claiming Player of the Series honors. Rohit Sharma follows closely at fourth place. Kohli's injury has created this opportunity for Gill, as they gear up to face England soon.

title: Claude Code creator Boris Cherny says 100% AI coding is becoming ‘problematic’
content: AI's role in coding is evolving, with Anthropic's Boris Cherny admitting that 100% AI-generated code presents challenges for companies focused on ROI.  He highlighted that the true bottleneck is now 'good ideas,' not just code output.  Cherny also foresees a shift from manual prompting to 'loop engineering,' where AI agents self-refine tasks, though this raises cost concerns. Anthropic offers tools to manage these expenses for enterprise clients.

title: After 15 deaths, Lucknow authorities to demolish residential building-turned-commercial hub
content: Following a tragic fire that claimed 15 lives, the Lucknow Development Authority has posted a demolition notice on the Aliganj building. The structure, approved for residential use, was allegedly operating commercially. An inquiry is underway into officials' roles regarding past violations and the revocation of a previous demolition order. Authorities are also investigating broader lapses that allowed the establishment to function.

title: 3 dead, 11 injured after warehouse shed collapses in Kolkata; rescue ops under way
content: A massive rescue operation is underway in Kolkata's Taratala area after an under-construction warehouse collapsed, trapping several people. Emergency services, including NDRF and army personnel, are on-site, using heavy machinery to clear debris and search for survivors. Four individuals have been rescued so far. The state government has established control rooms and released helpline numbers for the incident.

title: Portugal's FIFA World Cup R32 qualification scenario explained
content: Colombia booked their place in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 after defeating DR Congo 1-0 in their Group K clash on Wednesday. The South American side made it two wins from two matches after previously beating Uzbekistan 3-1. With six points from their opening two games, Colombia have secured qualification for the knockout stage with one group match still to play.

title: Will Mumbai schools and colleges remain closed tomorrow amid IMD orange alert?
content: Mumbai grappled with heavy rainfall and severe waterlogging on June 23, causing significant traffic disruptions. The IMD has issued an orange alert for the city, warning of intense showers and thunderstorms. Despite the adverse weather, no official announcement has been made regarding school or college closures for tomorrow. Educational institutions are expected to operate normally unless further directives are issued by the administration.

title: Taylor Swift is reportedly struggling with the Blake Lively fallout
content: Taylor Swift and Blake Lively’s bond has only worsened over the last few months as rumors swirl about the actress being invited to the pop star’s wedding to Travis Kelce which is set to happen in the next few weeks. While Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce focus on their wedding, it seems the pop star has gone through a wave of emotions.

title: Ronaldo vs Messi at FIFA World Cup 2026: CR7 says Portugal vs Argentina clash would be 'top''
content: Cristiano Ronaldo ended a difficult week with two goals as Portugal beat Uzbekistan 5-0, topping Group K at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The 41-year-old became the first player to score in six men's World Cups. After the match, Ronaldo called a potential showdown with Lionel Messi "awesome," a clash that could materialise in the quarterfinals if Portugal secure top spot in their group against Colombia on Saturday.

title: Pune murder case: Why not elope? Siya's lover reveals motive behind 'plot to kill' Ketan
content: A planned murder disguised as a trekking accident has been uncovered near Pune. Siya Goyal and her friend Chetan Chaudhary allegedly conspired to kill Ketan Agarwal, Siya's fiancé. Police suspect Siya feared family shame more than eloping with Chetan. Suspicious CCTV footage of a hooded figure at Lohagad Fort led investigators to the couple, who are now in custody.

title: As the monsoon cools India, a wave of gut infections sweeps the country
content: Monsoon's arrival in India brings relief from heat but also a surge in stomach ailments. High humidity and standing water create a breeding ground for bacteria, leading to widespread food and waterborne illnesses. Experts warn about contaminated street food and water, with vulnerable groups like children and the elderly at higher risk. Practicing strict hygiene, boiling water, and avoiding risky foods are crucial to prevent these seasonal infections.

title: MahaRERA portal changed: How buyers can check projects and complaints now
content: Maharashtra's homebuyers now have access to MahaCRITI, the new online hub replacing the previous portal for MahaRERA services. With this digital transformation, users can easily find project details, developer information, and submit complaints. This initiative is designed to enhance efficiency, enabling buyers to confirm project registrations and monitor their concerns. Any pending applications from the old system have been closed but may be refiled through the new platform.

title: 'They use religion to defame me': Punjab CM Bhagwant Mann rejects 'sacrilege' allegations
content: Punjab Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann has vehemently denied allegations of "sacrilegious conduct," calling them a "dirty politics" campaign by rivals. He stated that a viral video controversy, linked to an alleged Rs 10 lakh deal for a forensic report, is being exploited to tarnish his image. Mann insists the person in the video is an actor, not him, and accuses opposition parties of using religion for political gain.

title: Airfares could rise by up to 25% as jet fuel costs surge, says McKinsey
content: Global jet fuel supplies are facing significant pressure due to geopolitical events and refinery limitations, according to McKinsey. This is driving up costs for airlines, with potential airfare hikes of 20-25% expected as fuel prices surge. Inventories remain low, and key exporting regions are restricting shipments, creating a challenging outlook for the summer travel season.

title: Mumbai local train horror: 22-year-old stabbed to death after row over shutting door
content: A tragic incident unfolded on a Mumbai local train where a 22-year-old man was fatally stabbed after an argument over a coach door during heavy rain. The dispute turned violent between Andheri and Borivali, leading to the victim's death. The accused fled the scene at Borivali station. Authorities are actively searching for the suspect, reviewing CCTV footage, and questioning witnesses.

title: UK heatwave puts dogs at risk: Breeds most vulnerable to heatstroke
content: The soaring temperatures in the UK are increasingly dangerous for dogs, especially for breeds like French Bulldogs, English Bulldogs, Pugs, Chow Chows, and Saint Bernards. Their unique physical traits make it challenging for them to manage heat, raising the risk of heatstroke. Dog owners should ensure their pets stay cool indoors, have plenty of water, and avoid outdoor activities during the hottest parts of the day to prevent health hazards.

title: NBA Rising Stars Invitational: The dream, the gap and Indian Basketball's future
content: At the NBA Rising Stars Invitational in Singapore, Chennai's Velammal International School came face to face with the gap separating Indian basketball from Asia's best. Yet, amid defeats and difficult lessons, dreams remained intact. One player dreams of the NBA, another of an Olympic medal, while coach Shamsher Basha believes exposure and opportunity can help bridge the divide. For a team carrying expectations, the experience itself became reason enough to keep going.

title: India offers up to 9% leverage to NRIs to attract fresh forex inflows
content: India is actively seeking foreign currency inflows by encouraging its diaspora to deposit funds. Banks are now permitted to offer substantial leverage on these special foreign-currency deposits, with potential returns exceeding 6% and leveraged rates above 10%. This initiative aims to bolster foreign exchange reserves amidst global economic uncertainties and has the potential to attract over $80 billion.

title: Root reclaims no. 1 spot in ICC Test rankings ahead of Trent Bridge decider
content: Joe Root has reclaimed the world's top Test batting ranking, dethroning teammate Harry Brook after a stellar performance in the recent England-New Zealand Test. This marks Root's 12th stint at No. 1. He now aims to solidify his position in the series decider at Trent Bridge, where England also seeks to improve their World Test Championship standing after a slow over-rate penalty.

title: Crude prices drop to lowest since February on Iran supply hopes
content: Global crude oil prices have plunged to four-month lows, driven by improved tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz and anticipation of increased Iranian oil exports. This easing of supply disruption fears has led to significant drops in Brent and WTI futures. Despite this, underlying geopolitical uncertainties persist, with investors closely monitoring US-Iran negotiations and inventory data for future market direction.

title: 'US will never be communist': Trump's message follows big night for Mamdani-backed progressives
content: On Truth Social, Donald Trump delivered a stern warning, claiming America will 'NEVER' shift towards communism. This statement follows significant victories for progressive candidates endorsed by New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani. Trump's recent approach toward Mamdani has been surprisingly pragmatic, despite a history of vocal criticisms, highlighting the persistent ideological split between them.

title: Watch: Heavy rain lashes Mumbai, Thane; landslide hits Malshej Ghat
content: Mumbai and its surrounding districts are grappling with heavy rainfall, leading to a minor landslide at Malshej Ghat and widespread waterlogging. Authorities have issued weather alerts, with some areas under a red alert. Despite disruptions like the closure of the Andheri subway, essential services like suburban train operations remain largely unaffected. The region braces for continued downpours.

title: 'Tujhe full freedom hai': Axar Patel's message to Rishabh Pant
content: Rishabh Pant's return to Delhi Capitals for IPL 2027 has been met with full backing from captain Axar Patel. Patel emphasized Pant will have complete freedom, stressing their long-standing mutual understanding.  He assured Pant there's no extra pressure, calling Delhi his home. Patel believes Pant's inherent class will shine through, encouraging him to enjoy his natural game.

title: Messi and Ronaldo share once-in-a-lifetime World Cup coincidence
content: Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo have reached a remarkable statistical symmetry at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with both stars recording an identical 20-year and 6-day gap between their first and latest tournament goals. Messi moved ahead as the all-time World Cup top scorer with 18 goals, while Ronaldo became the first player to score in six editions of the tournament.

title: China’s new 'eyes in sky': How KJ-3000 is building Beijing’s airborne surveillance edge
content: China's innovative KJ-3000 airborne early warning aircraft, derived from the Y-20B transport, represents a pivotal enhancement in aerial defense with its state-of-the-art digital radar and powerful capabilities. This strategic advancement strengthens China's already formidable surveillance ecosystem, which boasts over 60 KJ-500 aircraft. As the US military grapples with modernization issues, China's rapid advancements in airborne battle management are poised to shift the airpower landscape significantly.

title: Ronaldo net worth prediction 2030: How high can Portugal billionaire go by end of the decade?
content: Cristiano Ronaldo is already one of the richest athletes in sports world. The Portuguese superstar has built a financial empire through years of hardwork. He earns through football contracts, sponsorships, business investments, and even social media. Ronaldo charges in millions for each promotional post on his Instagram. Ronaldo became the first active footballer to reach billionaire status.

title: 'Cocktail 2' BO Day 6 [LIVE]: Eyes Rs 75 crore before 'Welcome to the Jungle' arrives
content: Homi Adajania's 'Cocktail 2' starring Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna, has steadied itself after its steep Monday drop, holding flat at Rs 6.75 crore net on Day 5, exactly matching Day 4's collection. As it enters into Day 6 of its theatrical run, the domestic net now stands at Rs 61.50 crore, with the worldwide gross crossing Rs 95.11 crore. With a reported production budget of Rs 150 crore, the film is racing to cross the Rs 60 crore domestic net mark before Akshay Kumar's 'Welcome to the Jungle', whose advance bookings have just opened ahead of its June 26 release, arrives to claim a significant share of screens.

title: ITR filing FY26: Why Form 26AS is important for tax returns & how to download it online
content: Form 26AS is an important document that provides taxpayers with a consolidated view of tax related information linked to their Permanent Account Number (PAN).

title: DDA flats on offer again: Who should apply, what to check before booking
content: Delhi's aspiring homeowners can take advantage of two schemes introduced by the DDA, aimed at making housing accessible to different income levels. The DDA Nagrik Awaas Yojana and Towering Heights Karkardooma Housing Scheme offer flats in desirable locations such as Narela and Siraspur. With registrations open until June 30, these programs promise a fair, first-come, first-served allocation process to help individuals fulfill their housing dreams.

title: US citizenship may cost up to 80% more: Who can apply, what changes and how Indians may be impacted
content: The Department of Homeland Security is considering a drastic 80% increase in fees for US naturalization applications, which could make citizenship unaffordable for many. If implemented, the proposal would also remove fee waivers and discounts for low-income applicants, likely affecting a significant number of Indian citizens among new Americans, whose growth has recently slowed. The public is invited to comment on these proposals within 60 days.

title: Home loan guide: How banks approve, process and disburse your loan
content: Securing a home loan involves a structured process, beginning with an eligibility assessment based on your financial standing, credit score, and income stability. Following application and fee payment, lenders meticulously verify your details and the property's legal and technical aspects. Once sanctioned, a loan agreement is signed, leading to disbursal, either in full for ready properties or in stages for under-construction ones.

title: North Korea bets big on navy with first destroyer; Kim issues 'brink of nuclear war' warning
content: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un has unveiled his strategic vision to build two 5,000-ton warships over the next five years, indicating a notable enhancement in the country's naval capabilities. He reiterated that the naval nuclearization initiative is on track, stressing the pressing necessity for a modern naval base to counter perceived threats from the US and South Korea, reinforcing North Korea's commitment to nuclear deterrence.

title: Rescued Siberian huskies still waiting for homes as legal delays stall adoption in Hyderabad
content: Nearly two months after their rescue, 11 Siberian huskies and a German Shepherd, remain in Gajularamaram shelter.  Chargesheet yet to be filed against accused.

title: Kolkata warehouse collapse LIVE: About 13 rescued; several feared trapped,
content: According to locals present at the accident site, 50 to 60 workers were working at the site when the accident took place

title: Of Parai, Tholkaapiyam, and battling a stereotype
content: The Parai is at the forefront of discussions of caste empowerment. It has played an undeniable role in enabling the migration of the oppressed from the margins to the mainstream. But under that history is a fact: the Parai was, first, a language – and so, just as much, an identity

title: Lucknow building blaze: Suspended fire officer withdraws allegation of 'lapses' levelled at senior
content: "I was misled into making the video. I am extremely saddened by the loss of 15 lives in the incident," says  suspended Fire Station Second Officer

title: Fiscal prudence, the need of the hour for Tamil Nadu’s power utilities
content: The approach of successive governments to not hike user or service provider charges regularly has led to power sector entities accumulating debt

title: Anbumani calls on father and PMK founder Ramadoss
content: Dr. Anbumani, accompanied by his wife and Dharmapuri MLA Sowmiya Anbumani and other family members, visited his parents on the occasion of their 61st wedding anniversary

title: Two youth killed in bike accident near Nedumbassery in Ernakulam
content: Deceased identified as Gokul and Ashwin, both in their early 20s and natives of Irinjalakuda, Thrissur

title: KEA to seek Rural and Kannada medium certificates in digital form for CET, recruitment exams in Karnataka
content: Has submitted a request to the Department of School Education and Literacy (DSEL) to distribute these certificates to candidates in digital form

title: India eyes 100 GW as global hydropower shifts to ‘water battery’: report
content: The 2026 Global Hydropower Outlook says China continues to dominate global hydropower development, with more than 300 GW, including 218 GW of pumped storage, under construction

title: Jaishankar, South Korean FM discuss deepening strategic partnership in Seoul
content: The talks focused on follow-up measures in the key areas of trade, investment and finance, agreed during South Korean President Lee Jae-myung’s state visit to India in April

title: Watch: What is ammonia poisoning?
content: At least 9 people have died and around 69 others have been hospitalised after an ammonia gas leak at a seafood processing plant in the Tiruvallur district of Tamil Nadu. The incident has raised concerns about ammonia poisoning and the dangers associated with industrial gas leaks. So, what exactly is ammonia poisoning? What are the symptoms? How is it treated?

title: Shiv Sena at 60: Fragmentation of Maharashtra’s ‘Tiger’
content: From being a Thackeray-led party as the voice of the ‘Marathi Manoos’ in 1966, Shiv Sena is now reduced to playing second-fiddle to BJP and Thackeray’s control decimated

title: Jonnagiri: India’s largest private gold mine set to yield a tonne of gold a year
content: About 12 tonnes of gold lie under Jonnagiri, enough to yield some 400 kg in 2026-27 and pay Andhra Pradesh a 4% royalty

title: Emotional Uddhav offers to step down as Shiv Sena (UBT) president, Eknath Shinde hints at more defections
content: Mr. Thackeray calls for starting ‘Operation Lotus’ in response to ‘Operation Tiger’ allegedly carried out by the Shiv Sena to lure six of its nine Lok Sabha MPs into its fold and refuted allegations his party was likely to merge with the Congress

title: What constitutes a ‘workplace’ under POSH Act?
content: The High Court, in its judgment dated June 16, set aside the findings of an Internal Complaints Committee (ICC) that had held a State Bank of India (SBI) employee guilty of sexual harassment based on an incident that occurred during such travel

title: When Chennai’s Veeranam drinking water project hogged the headlines for all the wrong reasons
content: Decades ago, the Veeranam project, meant for bringing water to Chennai, had continued to evoke controversy for long

title: Maharashtra RTI rules amendments trigger criticism
content: New RTI Rules 2026 introduce higher fees, photo ID requirement and restrictions on applications; Anna Hazare threatens hunger strike

title: Monsoon tracker LIVE: Assam government monitoring flash flood situation in Arunachal
content: In view of the heavy rainfall in the upper catchments, a substantial rise in water levels and flow velocity is anticipated in the Brahmaputra river and its tributaries in the downstream areas of Assam

title: Railways, Cochin Port launch inquiries into ‘dismantling’ of defunct rail tracks at Willingdon Island
content: The inquiries started after the track between Q9 Berth of the port and the office of Tata Global Beverages were found dismantled, triggering suspicions about loss of valuable steel rails

title: Behind ‘Son of Thanjai’, the Tamil game that promises to revolutionise Indian gaming
content: Writer-lyricist Madhan Karky and Ayelet Studio head Abraham K take us through the making of their historical open-world game and speak about the challenges of making a rooted Tamil game with international appeal

title: Several trapped after under-construction warehouse shed collapses at Taratala in Kolkata
content: The Disaster Management Department of the West Bengal government have opened a control room where people can reach out at 8697981070, 033 22143526  and 033 22535185 in connection with the accident at Taratala

title: Shivamogga court receives bomb threat
content: Principal District and Sessions Judge G.A. Manjunatha said that he had reported the threat to the police without delay

title: Secunderabad Cantonment’s non-functional sewer network to get ₹246 crore revival
content: HMWSSB had laid trunk sewer lines of more than 300 mm diameter within Secunderabad Cantonment under the Japan International Cooperation Agency (JICA) project in 2010

title: Adani opens Mundra Airport for scheduled commercial flights to 4 cities
content: With this, Mundra has become the 9th airport of the Adani Group, and this location is set to become a fully integrated, multi-modal logistics and business hub

title: Abhishek Banerjee makes second appearance before CID in West Bengal MLAs signature forgery case
content: Trinamool spokesperson and Beleghata MLA Kunal Ghosh also arrived at around 3 p.m. and appeared before the CID in the same case

title: ED questions Abhishek for 11 hours in primary school jobs scam case
content: Officials said Trinamool Congress general secretary Abhishek Banerjee was questioned over the alleged money trail in the scam.

title: Calcutta High Court refuses urgent hearing in cases relating to Trinamool leader Abhishek Banerjee
content: Abhishek Banerjee, who is facing a battery of cases and FIRs, had prayed for an early hearing citing that he plans to visit abroad for his eye treatment

title: Kerala CM assures measures to address hardships caused by Kochi Metro second-phase works
content: Responding to a calling attention motion by Thrikkakara MLA Uma Thomas in Assembly, Satheesan says corrective measures are being taken to ease traffic congestion along Jawaharlal Nehru International Stadium-Infopark stretch

title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay tells ‘kutty story’ in Assembly; Udhayanidhi says House turned into a cinema
content: Though the CM did not name anyone from the Opposition parties in his story, his comments were widely interpreted as a reference to the defeat of former CM and DMK president M.K. Stalin in Kolathur

title: Video row: BJP demands arrest of Punjab CM Bhagwant Mann
content: Demanding that the Punjab police register a case and arrest Punjab CM Bhagwant Mann, BJP leader and Delhi Minister Manjinder Singh Sirsa accused the Chief Minister of insulting Sikhs and the Akal Takht

title: Kerala govt plans multi-layer defence against human-wildlife conflict: Forest Minister
content: Proposed defensive system to comprise AI-based surveillance and early-warning tools, followed by hanging fences and, where necessary, stronger defensive structures

title: Turpu Kapu association to hold constituency meetings across Srikakulam in July
content: Leaders of five parties met in Srikakulam to seek higher representation for a community now confined to a single Assembly seat

title: Kerala High Court invalidates oaths of 20 Thiruvananthapuram councillors, orders fresh swearing-in
content: High Court holds that councillors’ original oaths in the names of various deities, martyrs, and political movements in their swearing-in ceremony in January are invalid under Kerala Municipality Act, 1994

title: The Hindu Huddle concludes with evocative musical performance by former diplomat Nirupama Rao
content: Ms. Rao, who is also the founder of South Asian Symphony Foundation (SASF), took to the stage in accompaniment with Sri Lankan pianist Soundarie David Rodrigo as the former envoy blended her experience of diplomacy with songs to end the event on a musical high

title: Memories, Medium, or Message? Art as mirror to a world in transition
content: The role of art institutions, how art must respond to a shifting socio-political landscape and its power to shape collective opinion were discussed

title: AI will reshape jobs, but India’s bigger challenge is preparing workers, boardrooms and classrooms
content: ‘You need humans to frame questions and inputs, AI does the work, and then you need humans again at the end to verify the outcome’

title: We can’t become second-grade citizens in India due to Centre’s policies: Revanth Reddy
content: The Chief Minister said southern States would not accept an imbalance in political power distribution and highlighted that Telangana is positioning itself as a global investment destination while also introducing various welfare schemes

title: BJP in tricky spot in Thiruvananthapuram Corporation as 20 councillors, including KAAPA accused R. Sugathan, asked to retake oath
content: While Deputy Mayor G.S. Ashanath and councillor R. Vinod took their oath in January in the name of Bharath Matha, some of the councillors took oath in the name of ‘balidaanis’. Some chose to take oath in the name of their local deities

title: Bengaluru court re-issues non-bailable warrant against actor Prakash Raj
content: Complainant has alleged inthat besides being enrolled as a voter in the Shantinagar assembly segment in Bengaluru, Prakash Raj's name figured at two places in Chennai at the Velachary assembly constituency, and also in the Serilingam Pally assembly segment in Telangana.

title: Discovery of new moth genus in Kerala’s Idukki highlights Western Ghats’ hidden biodiversity
content: Known only from Idukki, the species of tiger moth, named Antaram idukki, underscores the need to conserve biodiversity-rich habitats in Western Ghats, say researchers

title: India slams Pakistan for 'unwarranted' remarks on J&K at UNSC’s Arria-formula meeting
content: Ambassador Parvathaneni Harish asserted that the Union Territory is a matter "strictly internal" to India

title: The goddess of instant gratification
content: Was the Nimishamba temple built when the first wave of settlers came? Or was it in the second wave when the company induced them to stay?

title: Bronze statue of Maharishi Sushruta made in Swamimalai unveiled at Royal College of Surgeons of Edinburgh
content: The statue was made at Swamimalai in Tamil Nadu by a team led by highly respected sculptor and master craftsman Ragavanantham Sthapathi

title: Rasimanal is a perfect alternative to Mekedatu, says veteran engineer
content: The veteran engineer, who addressed a letter to Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay a few weeks ago, giving a brief outline of the project, suggests that the proposed dam project be implemented as a joint venture of the two basin States.

title: Return enumeration forms or risk losing voter status: Hyderabad District Election Officer
content: The month-long revision process, beginning June 25, will also involve polling station rationalisation and verification of voter records ahead of the publication of revised electoral rolls

title: Watch: Pune fort murder: Police allege Fiancée, lover pushed man into gorge
content: What was first reported as an accidental fall at Pune’s Lohagad Fort has now turned into a murder investigation

title: Businessman, 13 others held for birthday bash on Brahmaputra bridge
content: Police also seized four high-end vehicles used for the midnight event to celebrate the birthday of Guwahati-based businessman Gautam Baruah’s wife

title: Warehouse Roof Collapses In Kolkata's Taratala, 40 Feared Trapped
content: Several workers were engaged in construction work at the warehouse when the roof of the three-floor building collapsed.

title: India's Rising Nighttime Temperatures Should Worry Us More Than We Think
content: In the last decade (2012-2022), Mumbai saw 15 additional very warm nights per summer, Bengaluru (11), Bhopal and Jaipur (7 each), Delhi (6), and Chennai (4), as per CEEW report.

title: 'Deal To End War Is A Declaration Of US Defeat': Top Iranian Negotiator
content: "The Islamabad understanding was not the result of pressure and coercion, but rather the result of the resistance and authority of the brave Iranian nation," Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said.

title: Stock Market Highlights, Sensex Today: Sensex Closes 790 Points Higher Amid Mixed Global Cues
content: Stock Market, Sensex, Share Market, Nifty Highlights: Brent crude futures were at $76.71 a barrel, and US WTI slipped 36 cents to $72.85 a barrel.

title: Oil Tanker Booked In Persian Gulf At 897% Of Benchmark Rate
content: South Korean shipowner Sinokor will supply the vessel at 897 Worldscale points, or 897% of the freight benchmark, according to shipbrokers.

title: US Top Court Sides With ExxonMobil In $1 Billion Cuban Damages Case
content: Exxon had sued Cuban state-owned companies Union Cuba-Petroleo (CUPET) and CIMEX seeking more than $1 billion in damages for the seizure of its property.

title: Without Missiles, US, Israel Would Have "Ploughed Iran Just Like Gaza"
content: Iran's missiles were initially developed to compensate for its weak air defences during the war with Iraq in the 1980s, and have since only gained range and accuracy.

title: Hours Before Killing Fiance, Pune Woman Met Lover At Cafe To Plan Murder
content: 26-year-old Ketan Agarwal was allegedly pushed into a gorge from the Lohagad Fort near Pune by his 20-year-old fiance, Siya Goyal, and her lover, Chetan Chaudhary.

title: 70 Rooms At 5-Star Hotel For Birthday: New Details In Pune Fort Murder Case
content: Siya and Ketan - the young son of a prominent Maharashtra businessman - had announced their engagement in February, and a grand wedding was scheduled for November.

title: Man Stabbed To Death In Moving Mumbai Local Train After Row Over Closing Door
content: The victim, identified as Mayank Lohar, was travelling in the first-class compartment of a Churchgate-Nallasopara fast local when he got into a heated argument with another passenger between Goregaon and Kandivali.

title: No Engine Damage, No Insurance Risk: Centre Debunks Viral Ethanol Myths
content: Ethanol blending is not unique to India. It is already widely used in major economies including the United States, Brazil and Japan.

title: Trump Rejected Own Data On India Tariffs, Argued With Aide, Claims Book
content: The argument came before the US first imposed a 25% tariff on India as part of its "Liberation Day" trade in April 2025.

title: Why Anthropic May Ask You For Your Government ID, Biometric Data
content: In the wake of the US government crackdown Anthropic is setting up stricter filters to track any suspicious behaviour. Although the company officially denies the link.

title: Why China Is Rushing To Help Rebuild Iran After The War With US
content: China is focusing on emergency humanitarian assistance, such as sending medical supplies and other relief materials to countries affected by conflict.

title: Airfares May Rise 25% As Jet Fuel Crack Spread May Cross $50: Report
content: This second factor is reflected in the jet fuel "crack spread"--a measure of the difference in price between crude oil and the fuel products that are refined from it, the report said.

title: Fake Blood Plasma Racket Busted In Ahmedabad, Mastermind Among 4 Arrested
content: The prime accused, identified as Dineshbhai Umabhai Chaudhary from Banaskantha, previously worked as a blood plasma collection executive at pharmaceutical firms

title: Man Falls Into Manhole In Front Of Mumbai Mayor, She Warns Of Suspension
content: The man has been identified as a sanitation worker associated with the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC).

title: "Private Franchisee Politics": BRS Jabs Congress Over Trump Road In Hyderabad
content: BRS MLC Sravan Kumar said the Telangana government's move was at variance with what Rahul Gandhi advocates at the national level and what his party reportedly stands for in national and international politics.

title: Opinion: Opinion | The Iran Paradox: 2 Things That Can Derail The Peace Process
content: The possibility of talks extending for months and years on two crucial issues may turn this 'roadmap' into a never-ending saga.

title: 'Starmer's Exit Won't Affect India-UK Trade Pact': City of London Corporation Policy Chief
content: Chris Hayward's remarks come at a crucial juncture as India and the UK move towards ratifying the long-awaited trade pact.
